task_goal: Improve repeatable handling of search results stay stale after filter reset: After applying filters and then resetting them, the UI still shows stale filtered results instead of returning to the full result set.
winner_pattern: Likely stale derived state, missing dependency tracking, or reset action not invalidating cached results
loser_pattern: A broad reset fix could break pagination, default sorting, or optimistic UI behavior

source_bug.title: Search results stay stale after filter reset

preconditions: A local UI environment is running with seeded searchable data
At least one filter reduces the visible result set
steps: Open the search page and apply a filter that reduces the list
Use the reset or clear-all control
Observe whether the result set returns to the unfiltered state immediately
reproduction.expected_behavior: The full unfiltered result set appears right after the reset action.
reproduction.actual_behavior: The UI state clears, but the old filtered results remain visible.

manual_checks: Re-run the filter-reset flow and confirm the list returns to the full dataset
Confirm a second filter application still works after the reset path

rollback.rollback_rule: Rollback on any hard-check failure or if reset starts causing empty or duplicated result sets
rollback.notes: Keep the last stable search interaction behavior documented with screenshots or a recorded repro.

source_bug.scope_notes: Keep the fix inside search state wiring and the filter reset path. Do not rework unrelated pagination, sorting, or backend search logic unless the root cause proves it is necessary.
